item.title: Allergens (full list)
item.description: Allergens: 1. Gluten 2. Eggs 3. Fish 4. Peanuts 5. Crustaceans 6. Milk 7. Soy 8. Sesame 9. Nuts 10. Celery 11. Mustard 12. Lupine 13. Sulphur dioxide 14. Molluscs 15. Garlic

item.title: 🍽 HUB1 - Sprout Lunch Menu:
item.description: 🍽 HUB1 - Sprout Lunch Menu: Our daily meal salad rich in seasonal vegetables with a choice of protein

item.title: 🍽 HUB1 - Globetrotter Lunch Menu:
item.description: 🍽 HUB1 - Globetrotter Lunch Menu: Cuban grilled chicken with rich Creole sauce and yellow rice, topped withspring onions. Sauce chien and creamy avocado on the side (15) GREEN DISH: dish Cuban inspired grilled tofu steak with Creole sauce and yellow rice, toppedwith spring onions. Sauce chien and avocado cream on the side

item.title: 🍽 HUB3 - Lunch Menu:
item.description: 🍽 HUB3 - Lunch Menu: Breaded pork cutlet served with boiled potatoes and creamed carrots,cauliflower and peas, topped with chopped parsley (1+2+6+11+15) GREEN DISH: dish Breaded mushroom patty with potatoes and creamed vegetables, topped with freshparsley

item.title: 🍽 HUB2 - Lunch Menu:
item.description: 🍽 HUB2 - Lunch Menu: Pasta with meatballs in rich tomato sauce, a comforting Italian classic (1+6+13+15) GREEN DISH: dish Pasta with vegetable balls in tomato sauce, rich and comforting

item.title: 🍽 HUB1 – Kays - Lunch Menu:
item.description: 🍽 HUB1 – Kays - Lunch Menu: Thai red curry with salmon and creamy coconut milk, served with jasmine riceand topped with roasted cashews and coconut flakes. Lime and coriander on theside (3+7+9+15) GREEN DISH: dish Thai red curry with chickpeas, edamame and coconut milk, served with jasminerice and topped with roasted cashews and coconut flakes. Lime and coriander onthe side (7+9+15)
